title: WHITE RABBIT PROJECT - 211info
text: THE WHITE RABBIT PROJECT WHITE RABBIT PROJECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides housing stabilization services including tenancy support and case management. Services include crisis intervention, documentation support, landlord coordination, and connection to community services. Also offers compliance and emergency preparedness support for adult care home operators. Eligibility: Must be referred from North Clackamas School District’s McKinney-Vento program Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (503) 927-3566 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 927-3566 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for information. Referral is required. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Varies AREA SERVED: Clackamas County Services: Case/Care Management * Housing Issues Housing Search Assistance If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
